subject: Fermi  trigger No 755225799: Global MASTER-Net observations report
submitter: Vladimir Lipunov at Moscow State U/Krylov Obs <lipunov@xray.sai.msu.ru>
body:
V.Lipunov, E.Gorbovskoy, N.Tiurina,  P.Balanutsa, , D.Vlasenko, I.Panchenko,
A.Kuznetsov,  G.Antipov,  A.Sankovich, A.Sosnovskij, Yu.Tselik, M.Gulyaev, Ya.Kechin,
V.Senik, A.Chasovnikov, K.Labsina, I. Gorbunov (Lomonosov MSU),
O.Gress, N.Budnev (ISU),
C.Francile,  F. Podesta, R.Podesta, E. Gonzalez  (Observatorio Astronomico Felix Aguilar (OAFA),
A. Tlatov, D. Dormidontov (Kislovodsk Solar Station of the Pulkovo Observatory),
A. Gabovich, V.Yurkov (Blagoveschensk Educational StateUniversity)
D.Buckley (SAAO),
R.Rebolo (The Instituto de Astrofisica de Canarias),
L.Carrasco, J.R.Valdes, V.Chavushyan, V.M.Patino Alvarez, J.Martinez,
A.R.Corella, L.H.Rodriguez (INAOE, Guillermo Haro Astrophysics Observatory) 

MASTER-Tunka robotic telescope  (Global MASTER-Net: http://observ.pereplet.ru, Lipunov et al., 2010, Advances in Astronomy, vol. 2010, 30L)  located in Russia (Applied Physics Institute, Irkutsk State University) started inspect of the Fermi GRB241207.04 (trigger No 755225799,20h 13m 19.92s , +01d 52m 58.8s, R=27) errorbox  42443 sec after notice time and 42477 sec after trigger time at 2024-12-07 12:44:32 UT, with upper limit up to  17.4 mag. The observations began at zenith distance = 82 deg. The sun  altitude  is -34.0 deg. 

MASTER-Kislovodsk robotic telescope  located in Russia (Lomonosov MSU, Kislovodsk Solar Station of Pulkovo observatory) started inspect of the Fermi GRB241207.04 errorbox  49802 sec after notice time and 49836 sec after trigger time at 2024-12-07 14:47:11 UT, with upper limit up to  12.7 mag. Observations started at twilight.  The observations began at zenith distance = 60 deg. The sun  altitude  is -12.6 deg. 

MASTER-OAFA robotic telescope  located in Argentina (OAFA observatory of San Juan National University) started inspect of the Fermi GRB241207.04 errorbox  85440 sec after notice time and 85474 sec after trigger time at 2024-12-08 00:41:09 UT, with upper limit up to  18.6 mag. Observations started at twilight.  The observations began at zenith distance = 61 deg. The sun  altitude  is -13.9 deg. 

The galactic latitude b = -18 deg., longitude l = 45 deg.


Real time updated cover map and OT discovered available here: 
https://master.sai.msu.ru/site/master2/observ.php?id=2698706

We obtain a following upper limits.
